message:
refactor(loader): remove YAML branch from readRootDir

Remove the legacy YAML loading path from readRootDir, which checked for
.yaml/.yml files before falling through to the Markdown tree scanner.
The actual root/ directory uses .md files exclusively, making the YAML
branch dead code. Also deletes the now-unused parseAgentSpec function
and updates test fixtures to use the Markdown tree layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
